mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.review_id AS reviewId, r.user_id AS userId, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, u.login_id AS loginId FROM review_reply r JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.review_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_reply (review_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{userId}, #{content})
